Localization.Description: A system library file was changed

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: System library file {object.fullpath} was created on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} compiled and added library "{object.name}" to the system library directory on host {event_src.host}
System library file {object.fullpath} was changed on host {event_src.host}
A user with ID {subject.account.id} changed system library file {object.fullpath} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} changed system library file {object.fullpath} on host {event_src.host}
